Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION

Title: Requires certain anti-aging skin care products to contain a warning label
Summary: Requires certain anti-aging skin care products to contain a warning label; sets forth requirements for the language, size, and placement of such warning label; establishes penalties for violating such provisions.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to requiring certain anti-aging skin care products to contain a warning label
